ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-19-2022 Continued To Nov-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Rinne, via Zoom, for and with Ronald Sticka, Personal Representative; Noelani Nasser, via Zoom, for Special Administrator in related San Mateo County matter.

Mr. Sticka reports that he has been unsuccessful in hiring new counsel and requests to proceed in this matter moving forward, pro se. Mr. Rinne reports regarding his non-appearance at the previous calling of this matter advising that it was an oversight. The court confirms with Mr. Sticka that he has experience practicing law which gives the court a level of comfort regarding him moving forward pro se. Ms. Nasser reports that her firm has received and advises that she is willing to work with Mr. Sticka.

After additional discussion, the Status Hearing is continued to Nov-21-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The Order to Appear is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-22-2022 Continued To Sep-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Personal Representative Ronald R. Sticka and Attorney Michael Rinne to appear on Sep-19-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why they have failed to address the Examiner's notes. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
